$comment: Global AI Workload Detector config (discovered via $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/AIWorkloadDetector/aiwd.json). storage.home routes the store, bronze, evidence, portal data, and reports under one root. Any single path is still overridable via a flag or AIWD_* env var. %VAR% expands and dirs are created on demand. WARNING: evidence.mode=full writes verbatim request/response bodies INCLUDING secrets to disk.
